race_meta.race_name: Safer Gambling At CopyBet Mares' Handicap Hurdle

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model ranked no no fizz at position 7 with only 4.0% probability. Top pick was Jessie Jump Jet (25.0%). Analysis missed key factors driving the winning horse's form.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Jessie Jump Jet > Ever Ready, but actual result was No No Fizz > Innisfree Pearl. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner No No Fizz had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -0.4%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
